mapper.update: UPDATE biz_warehouse SET warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, manager = #{manager}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_warehouse WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT * FROM biz_warehouse WHERE is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_warehouse SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
